hyperedges.label: Shared haptic feedback interaction pattern across touchable components
useTheme + makeStyles(C) dynamic styling pattern shared by presentational components
AppContext settings persisted to AsyncStorage (colorMode, fontSize, defaultLang)
Screens applying consistent haptic feedback on interaction (light/medium/success)
Screens consuming useTheme()/makeStyles(C) dynamic theming pattern from theme/colors.js
Selected reciter persisted in AsyncStorage('selected_reciter') and read by three independent screens to drive UI/audio

nodes.label: EDITIONS string (quran-uthmani, en.transliteration, en.asad, ru.osmanov, kk.khalifahaltai)
nodes.norm_label: editions string (quran-uthmani, en.transliteration, en.asad, ru.osmanov, kk.khalifahaltai)

nodes.label: QuranApp Icon Preview (canvas-drawn crescent moon + star + Arabic text icon mockup)
